Dear Mike,

Thank you for reporting this critical issue. We have received your alert regarding the 503 API errors affecting your service since 10 AM today.

I can confirm that our Critical Infrastructure team has been immediately engaged to investigate this outage. Our engineers are actively monitoring the API endpoints and working to restore full connectivity to your fleet routing system.

We understand the urgency of this situation given its impact on your trapped trucks and route operations. The team will provide you with frequent status updates as they proceed with their investigation and resolution efforts.

Please expect a detailed update within the next 15 minutes.

We appreciate your patience as we resolve this issue.

Best regards,

Critical Infrastructure Support Team
TAAS-CPaaS

content.subject: Incident Notification: GCP Cloud Exchange Latency - INC-88421
content.body_html:
Incident Notification

Incident ID: INC-88421
Severity: High (Sev2)
Status: Mitigation in Progress

Issue Summary

We are currently experiencing elevated latency on Cloud Exchange peering with Google Cloud Platform in us-central1. This is affecting your connectivity services.

Root Cause

Capacity exhaustion on aggregation-node-04 is causing service degradation.

Mitigation Actions

Our team is actively rerouting traffic to a secondary path to relieve the capacity constraint. This action is being executed immediately.

Impact to You

You may experience brief latency fluctuations during the transition. We expect full recovery within 30 minutes.

Updates

We will provide status updates as they become available. Our status page will have the latest information.

We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your patience.
